name: Red Cabbage and Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith apples, cored and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the cabbage and cut it in half from top to bottom through the stem end. Shred or slice into very thin slices. Place the shredded cabbage in a large bowl and toss with grated carrot, diced celery, and diced apple.
2. In another bowl, mix together the peanut oil, cider vinegar, sugar, and caraway seeds. Season generously with salt and black pepper.
3. Toss the cabbage mixture with the dressing, then serve immediately or refrigerate (covered tightly) for up to 24 hours.
